title: The Legend Of WiiU
description: A mod which attempts to add features from The Legend Of Zelda into Minecraft
body:
So, this is The Legend Of WiiU, its a Minecraft mod that I'm making which is intended to recreate mechanics, items and general things from The Legend Of Zelda series.

Currently in a beta because I'm still learning how to code a mod, and that STUPID GLOBAL LOOT MODIFIERS- I mean what nothing.

But in all seriousness, most of the items/features are still being worked on, I'm currently active around this project and hope it brings joy to people once its actually functional (Still hate you global loot modifiers).

I wish you all great WiiU.

And as always, you get no further context to why its WiiU :)
Poof!

-Mavity The Madity (EpicVon2468)

Also, NeoForge version may not be as active, as fabric 1.20.1 is better documented for me.
(Basically don't expect to see any uploads for NeoForge version until I've done a bunch on the fabric version)
